commands_analyzed.name: ultrathink-interactive.md
commands_analyzed.roast: This command is 673 lines of JavaScript theater masquerading as productivity. With 62 functions and a complexity score of 5, it violates every principle in CLAUDE.md. Its 15-point usability penalty makes it more complex than the problems it solves.

commands_analyzed.name: adaptive-complexity-router.md
commands_analyzed.roast: A command that routes by complexity while being unnecessarily complex itself. 499 lines to decide if something is complex? The irony is thicker than the documentation.

commands_analyzed.name: context-enhanced-executor.md
commands_analyzed.roast: Loads documentation to execute commands. Because apparently reading the manual before doing anything is revolutionary in 2025. 132 lines to say "read docs first."

commands_analyzed.name: adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.md
commands_analyzed.roast: 457 lines of hyperfocus management. The time spent reading this command could have been used for actual hyperfocus. Peak ADHD irony: building complex systems to manage complexity.

commands_analyzed.name: generate-thinking-command.md
commands_analyzed.roast: The only command that passed the sanity test. 137 lines, no violations. Proves that simple solutions exist - they just get outnumbered by 500-line monsters.

most_efficient.name: generate-thinking-command.md
most_efficient.roast: The only command that passed the sanity test. 137 lines, no violations. Proves that simple solutions exist - they just get outnumbered by 500-line monsters.

least_efficient.name: ultrathink-interactive.md
least_efficient.roast: This command is 673 lines of JavaScript theater masquerading as productivity. With 62 functions and a complexity score of 5, it violates every principle in CLAUDE.md. Its 15-point usability penalty makes it more complex than the problems it solves.

key_findings: 20% of commands are critically over-engineered (≥5 violations)
conclusions.savage_summary: Your command suite violates the KISS principle with mathematical precision. 1 out of 5 commands passes basic sanity checks. The rest read like doctoral dissertations for tasks that should be one-liners.
conclusions.roi_analysis: Negative ROI detected. Time spent reading these commands exceeds time saved by using them.
recommendations: Delete ultrathink-interactive.md and replace with a 20-line script
Study generate-thinking-command.md - it's the only one that works
Apply CLAUDE.md simplicity rules with religious devotion
Remember: Complexity score ≥ 5 = STOP and simplify
